Product Description: Since 1966, Gino's East of Chicago has been serving up legendary deep-dish pizza to Chicagoans and worldwide visitors at their landmark downtown Chicago eatery. Generations of patrons have written their names & noted special moments on the walls which remain today.
Lovers of Gino's authentic Chicago deep-dish pizza savor the abundance of fresh ingredients, cheeses, spices, signature pizza sauce and famous golden brown crust.

Now you can enjoy that same eating experience with Gino's East frozen deep-dish pizza, just don't write on the walls at home. We hope you'll enjoy all the delicious varieties of Gino's East of Chicago authentic deep-dish pizza now available in your grocer's freezer. We appreciate your comments.

Please note that our warehouse packs everything as tightly as possible to ensure the item(s) remains frozen/refrigerated during transit and the coolant surrounds the item(s). As dry ice dissipates and gel packs thaw, this will create pockets of space in the package whereby products can shift around.

Upon receiving the delivery, please immediately place your items in your refrigerator or freezer. If you are away when your package arrives, please watch your email for delivery confirmation. Upon delivery, plan for someone to place them in a refrigerator or freezer as soon as possible. Value: 3.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium-brand frozen pizza positioned as a gourmet experience with heritage ties to Chicago deep-dish tradition. The 3-pack bundling and 'Deluxe' branding signal value for families or frequent consumers, while handcrafted ingredient claims (GMO-free flour, fresh cheese, vine-ripened tomatoes) justify a mid-to-high price tier. Packaging emphasizes authenticity and quality, aligning with the premium positioning despite being a frozen product. No visible certifications or organic claims, but the 'original handmade recipe' and 'fresh ingredients' narrative drive perceived value.
